caption: A person's hands hold up a sports trading card featuring a basketball player wearing a dark jersey with the number 13. The card has a dark background and is titled "PITCH BLACK" at the top and "OBSIDIAN" at the bottom. As the hands tilt the card, the surface reflects light, shifting from a purple hue to a golden-yellow shimmer. The background is a red and black surface with a large, blurred logo. The image is a collage that includes small inset windows showing a man with a beard sitting at a desk with equipment in a room. On-screen text displays "JASPYS" and the website "CASEBREAKS.COM" in red and white lettering. The sequence captures the holographic effect of the card's finish as it is moved in front of the camera.
